name: SC-001: Successful Login Redirects to Inventory
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce and verify the Products heading is visible.

name: SC-002: Product Name Opens Detail Page
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Sauce Labs Backpack product image, and verify the Back to products button is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the product name Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the Add to Cart button is visible.

name: SC-003: Cart Badge Updates on Add to Cart
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the shopping cart badge displays 1.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Add to Cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the cart badge shows 1.

name: SC-004: Cart Page Lists Added Items
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack to the cart, and verify the cart badge shows 1.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the cart icon, and verify the item name Sauce Labs Backpack is visible.

name: SC-005: Sort by Price Low to High
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select "Price (low to high)" from the sort dropdown, and verify the price $7.99 is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the price $7.99 is visible.
